User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap index (auto-generated by @astrojs/sitemap)
# /etf/[isin] detail pages are intentionally excluded from the sitemap and
# are served with <meta name="robots" content="noindex, follow"> at the page level.
Sitemap: https://etfpruvodce.cz/sitemap-index.xml

# Block API routes (server-side only)
Disallow: /api/

# Allow CSS and JS assets for proper rendering
# IMPORTANT: DO NOT block /_astro/ - contains critical CSS and JS files for Google rendering!
